title: SEAF MC Modpack
description: The Official Modpack for the SEAF MC Minecraft Server.
body:
## General Info
This pack exists to give the players of the SEAF MC minecraft server a more closely integated experience with the unique mechanics of the server.
While it is possible to use this on other servers we would not recommend it. As this pack contains specific mods that may trigger non vanilla anti-cheat systems.

## Updates
We try to update this pack as soon as possible after major minecraft updates. You can also expect occasional mini updates every once in a while.

## Credits
1. Based off the [Fabously Optimised](https://download.fo/) modpack.
2. Thank you to the amazing devopers of the included mods.
3. Developed and maintained by the SEAF MC server staff.
